metadata.description: Short environment name used in resource tags and names.
Azure region for regional resources.
Resource name prefix. Keep this short to avoid Azure name-length limits.
Tags applied to all supported resources.
Whether to create and attach a public custom domain on Front Door.
Public host name served by Front Door when custom domains are enabled.
Whether Azure DNS is expected to manage the Front Door custom domain.
Optional Azure DNS zone resource ID used for Front Door custom-domain onboarding.
Front Door SKU. Premium is required for managed WAF rules and bot protection.
Whether Front Door should create and attach a WAF policy. Disabled by default so deployments are not blocked by subscription feature approval.
Front Door WAF policy mode.
Managed rule set version for Front Door WAF.
Bot Manager rule set version for Front Door WAF.
Per-client request threshold for the /api/* rate-limit WAF rule.
Rate-limit window in minutes for the /api/* WAF rule.
Static Web Apps SKU.
Azure region for the Static Web App. This may need to differ from the main workload region.
Function runtime name for both Function Apps.
Function runtime version for both Function Apps.
Azure region for Function Apps and Flex Consumption plans.
Flex Consumption memory size per instance, in MB.
Maximum elastic scale-out instance count per Function App.
HTTP concurrency per API Function App instance.
Optional always-ready HTTP instances for the API Function App.
Optional always-ready instances for the worker Function App.
Whether Function Flex Consumption plans should be created or updated by this deployment. Set false to reuse existing plans when Azure rejects Flex plan updates in an existing resource group.
Blob containers created in the shared Storage Account.
Queues created in the shared Storage Account.
SQL administrator username used for bootstrap SQL auth operations.
SQL administrator password used for bootstrap SQL auth operations. Override this at deploy time.
Microsoft Entra login name configured as the logical server administrator.
Microsoft Entra object ID configured as the logical server administrator.
Microsoft Entra object ID that should have secret-management access in Key Vault.
Tenant ID used for Key Vault and Azure SQL AAD administrator configuration.
Primary database name.
Serverless Azure SQL SKU name.
Azure SQL SKU tier.
Azure SQL SKU family.
Azure SQL serverless SKU capacity.
Minimum serverless compute capacity.
Auto-pause delay for Azure SQL serverless, in minutes.
Maximum database size in bytes.
Whether the SQL logical server should create the AllowAzureServices firewall rule.
Whether Azure SQL should enforce Azure AD-only authentication.
Retention period for the Log Analytics workspace.
Whether purge protection is enabled on Key Vault.
Key Vault secret name for the bootstrap SQL administrator password.
Key Vault secret name for the Google OAuth client ID.
Key Vault secret name for the Google OAuth client secret.
Key Vault secret name for the Microsoft OAuth client ID.
Key Vault secret name for the Microsoft OAuth client secret.
Key Vault secret name for the Microsoft OAuth tenant ID.

appSettings.value: [union(createObject('APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'appInsights'), '2025-04-01').outputs.connectionString.value, 'AzureWebJobsStorage', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'storage'), '2025-04-01').outputs.connectionString.value, 'FRONT_DOOR_PUBLIC_HOST', parameters('publicHostName'), 'FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION', '~4', 'GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_SECRET_NAME', parameters('googleClientIdSecretName'), 'GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET_SECRET_NAME', parameters('googleClientSecretSecretName'), 'IMPORT_JOBS_QUEUE_NAME', parameters('storageQueueNames')[0], 'KEY_VAULT_URI', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'keyVault'), '2025-04-01').outputs.vaultUri.value, 'LEAGUEBRIEF_ENVIRONMENT', parameters('environmentName'), 'MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID_SECRET_NAME', parameters('microsoftClientIdSecretName'), 'MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET_SECRET_NAME', parameters('microsoftClientSecretSecretName'), 'MICROSOFT_TENANT_ID_SECRET_NAME', parameters('microsoftTenantIdSecretName'), 'PUBLIC_BASE_URL', variables('publicBaseUrl'), 'SQL_ADMIN_LOGIN', parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin'), 'SQL_ADMIN_PASSWORD', format('@Microsoft.KeyVault(VaultName={0};SecretName={1})', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'keyVault'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value, parameters('sqlAdminPasswordSecretName')), 'SQL_AUTHENTICATION_MODE', if(parameters('sqlAzureAdOnlyAuthentication'), 'azuread-only', 'hybrid'), 'SQL_DATABASE_NAME', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'sql'), '2025-04-01').outputs.databaseName.value, 'SQL_SERVER_FQDN', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'sql'), '2025-04-01').outputs.serverFullyQualifiedDomainName.value, 'STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'storage'), '2025-04-01').outputs.accountName.value, 'STORAGE_EXPORTS_CONTAINER', parameters('storageBlobContainerNames')[2], 'STORAGE_FANTASYPROS_CONTAINER', parameters('storageBlobContainerNames')[1], 'STORAGE_JOB_ARTIFACTS_CONTAINER', parameters('storageBlobContainerNames')[3], 'STORAGE_RAW_ESPN_CONTAINER', parameters('storageBlobContainerNames')[0]), createObject('APP_KIND', 'api', 'API_BASE_URL', if(equals(variables('publicBaseUrl'), ''), '', format('{0}/api', variables('publicBaseUrl'))), 'FUNCTION_APP_ROLE', 'api'))]

variables.effectiveScaleAndConcurrency: [if(greater(parameters('alwaysReadyHttpInstances'), 0), createObject('alwaysReady', createArray(createObject('instanceCount', parameters('alwaysReadyHttpInstances'), 'name', 'http')), 'instanceMemoryMB', parameters('instanceMemoryMb'), 'maximumInstanceCount', parameters('maximumInstanceCount'), 'triggers', createObject('http', createObject('perInstanceConcurrency', parameters('httpPerInstanceConcurrency')))), createObject('instanceMemoryMB', parameters('instanceMemoryMb'), 'maximumInstanceCount', parameters('maximumInstanceCount'), 'triggers', createObject('http', createObject('perInstanceConcurrency', parameters('httpPerInstanceConcurrency')))))]

variables.effectiveScaleAndConcurrency: [if(greater(parameters('alwaysReadyHttpInstances'), 0), createObject('alwaysReady', createArray(createObject('instanceCount', parameters('alwaysReadyHttpInstances'), 'name', 'http')), 'instanceMemoryMB', parameters('instanceMemoryMb'), 'maximumInstanceCount', parameters('maximumInstanceCount'), 'triggers', createObject('http', createObject('perInstanceConcurrency', parameters('httpPerInstanceConcurrency')))), createObject('instanceMemoryMB', parameters('instanceMemoryMb'), 'maximumInstanceCount', parameters('maximumInstanceCount'), 'triggers', createObject('http', createObject('perInstanceConcurrency', parameters('httpPerInstanceConcurrency')))))]

variables.customDomainProperties: [union(createObject('hostName', parameters('publicHostName'), 'tlsSettings', createObject('certificateType', 'ManagedCertificate', 'minimumTlsVersion', 'TLS12')), if(and(parameters('manageDnsInAzure'), not(empty(parameters('dnsZoneResourceId')))), createObject('azureDnsZone', createObject('id', parameters('dnsZoneResourceId'))), createObject()))]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('profileName'), parameters('endpointName'), 'web-route')]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('enabledState', 'Enabled', 'forwardingProtocol', 'MatchRequest', 'httpsRedirect', 'Enabled', 'linkToDefaultDomain', 'Enabled', 'originGroup', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/originGroups', parameters('profileName'), 'web-origins')), 'patternsToMatch', createArray('/*'), 'supportedProtocols', createArray('Http', 'Https')), if(and(parameters('enableCustomDomain'), not(empty(parameters('publicHostName')))), createObject('customDomains', variables('routeCustomDomains')), createObject()))]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('profileName'), parameters('endpointName'), 'api-route')]
resources.properties: [union(createObject('enabledState', 'Enabled', 'forwardingProtocol', 'MatchRequest', 'httpsRedirect', 'Enabled', 'linkToDefaultDomain', 'Enabled', 'originGroup', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Cdn/profiles/originGroups', parameters('profileName'), 'web-origins')), 'patternsToMatch', createArray('/api/*'), 'supportedProtocols', createArray('Http', 'Https')), if(and(parameters('enableCustomDomain'), not(empty(parameters('publicHostName')))), createObject('customDomains', variables('routeCustomDomains')), createObject()))]
